visits.note: Patient P046 presented with 6 months history of fatigue and polyuria, diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes with HbA1c 7.2, Hypertension with BP 140/90, and Hyperlipidemia with LDL 130. Started on Metformin 500mg BID and Lisinopril 10mg OD.

Patient P046 returned 6 months post-diagnosis with worsening fatigue and new onset of nocturia. HbA1c increased to 8.1, BP 150/95, and LDL 140. Increased Metformin dose to 1000mg BID and added Simvastatin 20mg OD. Diagnosed with worsening Type 2 Diabetes and Hypertension.

Patient P046 returned 8 months post-last visit with worsening fatigue, polyuria, and new onset of pedal edema. HbA1c decreased to 7.5, BP 145/90, and eGFR 50. Diagnosed with worsening Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, and worsening Chronic Kidney Disease. Started on Furosemide 20mg BID.
